zh.Row, Dunbartonshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾爾胡
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulf de Moray於大約1120年出生在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾時，他的父親Dunegal Moray31歲，母親Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith21歲。他和Bethoc MacFergus至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1165年在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾爾胡享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾。

zh-hans.Row, Dunbartonshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾爾胡
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulf de Moray于大约1120年出生在苏格兰艾爾金爾时，他的父亲Dunegal Moray31岁，母亲Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith21岁。他和Bethoc MacFergus至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1165年在英国苏格兰登巴頓史爾爾胡享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: topographic name for someone who lived by a mulberry tree, moral, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word. Compare Del Moral .

variants.name: Del Moral
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Antonio, Armando, Luis, Mario, Roberto, Alicia, Ana, Carlos, Engracia, Jorge, Juan Manuel.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition and definite article del ‘from the’, of Moral ‘mulberry tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Ranulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

en.lifeSummary: When Ranulf de Moray was born about 1120, in Elginshire, Scotland, his father, Dunegal Moray, was 31 and his mother, Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Bethoc MacFergus. He died about 1165, in Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulf de Moray est né environ 1120, à Elginshire, Écosse, son père, Dunegal Moray, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Bethoc MacFergus. Il est décédé environ 1165, à Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulf de Moray um 1120 in Elginshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dunegal Moray 31 und seine Mutter Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith 21. Er hatte mit Bethoc MacFergus mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1165 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf de Moray è nato il circa 1120 nel Elginshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Dunegal Moray, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Bethoc MacFergus. Morì circa 1165, nel Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランド

イギリススコットランド
ja.lifeSummary: Ranulf de Morayが約1120年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Dunegal Morayは31歳，母Lady Dunegal Of Strathnithは21歳であった。彼はBethoc MacFergusとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1165年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアルハで47歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulf de Moray(이)가 대략 1120년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dunegal Moray(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Bethoc MacFergus(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1165년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 후에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1120–about 1165: tany ho any amin'ny 1120–tany ho any amin'ny 1165

mn.Row, Dunbartonshire, Scotland: Rhu, Alclut, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulf de Moray nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Elginshire, Scotland, seu pai, Dunegal Moray, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Bethoc MacFergus. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1165, em Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulf de Moray родился около 1120 г. в местности элгиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Dunegal Moray было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Bethoc MacFergus. Он умер около 1165 г. в местности ру, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности элгиншир, Шотландия.

sm.about 1120–about 1165: e tusa o le 1120–e tusa o le 1165

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ranulf de Moray nació aproximadamente 1120, en Elginshire, Scotland, su papá, Dunegal Moray, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Dunegal Of Strathnith, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Bethoc MacFergus. Murió aproximadamente 1165, en Rhu, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Elginshire, Scotland.
